text: Painful reps and early mornings. Still trying to fix my sleep schedule after moving to a new place. 2 months off the gym was a setback, but every rep now reminds me my dreams are worth the sacrifice.
decision_reason: opening up about personal struggles to connect with the audience

text: I see you, struggling to get back on track. It's tough, but every small step towards your dreams, no matter how painful, is a win. My own journey back to the gym has been tough, but it's a reminder that showing up is what matters.
decision_reason: showing empathy and understanding to attract like-minded individuals
